L-dopa therapy one of the miracles of 20th Century
medicine.
Problems became apparent over the years:
Rich IVRY
Efficacy of drugs decreases.
Many patients develop movement problems from drugs.
About 50% after five years of L-dopa therapy.
e chirca BD ... Dyskinesia Ivry (head movement)
